title: Oil prices fall: Brent tumbles nearly 6% below $98 as US-Iran deal optimism grows
snippet: Brent crude decreased to $96.31/bbl, lowest since April 2026. Over past 4 weeks, Brent lost 5.18%. WTI also declined. Full Hormuz reopening would push oil substantially lower — strait carries ~1/5 of global oil and LNG. In last 12 months Brent increased 49.42%.
tag_reason: New: Brent crude at lowest since April 2026 — significant shift from $103 reported on May 23
